hero.title: I build digital products with technical and business vision.

contact.title: Shall we work together?
contact.description: I’m available for opportunities as a web developer, frontend developer, full stack developer, or technical product owner.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I have over 12 years of experience in IT, with 8 years leading end-to-end projects, coordinating multidisciplinary teams, and ensuring high-impact deliveries.
about.p2: Throughout my career, I have worked with agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban, as well as traditional approaches when required by the context.
about.p3: I have led more than 20 web and mobile development projects, actively participating in planning, requirements definition, backlog management, KPI tracking, and stakeholder coordination.
about.p4: Additionally, I have experience in system integrations, technological migrations, and continuous process improvement, allowing me to bring both strategic and technical perspectives.
about.p5: My management has increased implementation effectiveness by 50% and contributed to a 5% reduction in new project losses by optimizing processes and mitigating risks strategically.
